english_professor_news.title: Jim Cramer sends a stern message to SpaceX buyers

level1_blind.text:
The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link. Prices displayed are informational.

Every generational stock reaches a moment where its biggest fans start watching the tape with one eye closed. The story is still good. The buying is still frantic. And somewhere in the back of the room, a few people who own the dream begin asking how much of tomorrow has already been priced into today.

SpaceX (SPCX) priced its initial public offering (IPO) at $135 a share on June 12 and raised about $75 billion. It was the biggest stock-market debut on record, according to CNN. The stock jumped roughly 19% on its first day, kept climbing through June 15, and by the morning of June 16 the aerospace and artificial intelligence (AI) company had passed Microsoft (MSFT) toward a value near $2.7 trillion. Retail investors had reportedly placed more than $100 billion in orders before a single share changed hands.

CNBC's Jim Cramer, who has said more than once that he likes SpaceX, warned on June 16 that the stock had started to behave like something he no longer trusts.

Cramer's discomfort is about mechanics, not the mission. He said he would hate to watch a meme stock, which is what he believes SpaceX has become, get "walked to the size of Nvidia" through a string of overnight moves with no one selling, in a post on X. Nvidia (NVDA) carried a market value of roughly $5 trillion as of June 15, according to Companies Market Cap, so he was describing a near doubling from where SpaceX trades today.

His sharper point was about speed. He said watching the stock climb ten points in a couple of hours made him uneasy, and then he repeated that he still likes the company.

That contradiction is the honest part, and it is the part that should land for anyone who bought this week. When I read through his post, the tell in my analysis was not the size of the gain. It was the idea of a one-way market where nobody is willing to sell. A stock that rises only because no one will take a profit is a stock waiting for the first person who does.

Not everyone accepts the label. Analysts at 24/7 Wall St. argued that SpaceX fails the meme-stock test, because the rally rides on real launch, satellite, and AI businesses rather than a coordinated online crowd, according to 24/7 Wall St. The fairer read may be that Cramer is flagging valuation risk and reaching for the scarier word to make it stick.

level2_keywords.example: Cuban called for a rethink of accredited investor laws.
Many companies choose to stay private for much longer than before.
Venture capital firms capture a large part of the upside before the IPO.
The rules were designed to protect regular people from scams.
He proposed replacing the standard with a financial literacy test.

english_professor_news.level2_context: 白話背景：這篇新聞在探討國際政經政策對核心科技產業（如晶片出口、通膨升息）造成的宏觀影響。這些變動會透過半導體與伺服器代工供應鏈，在幾天內迅速傳導至台灣股市，是主力資金調度的重要風向球。

english_professor_news.title: Teamsters to fight UPS over alleged use of nonunion drivers

level1_blind.text:
The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link. Prices displayed are informational.

The Teamsters unanimously passed a resolution at its international convention in Las Vegas this week instructing leadership to challenge United Parcel Service for violating the 2023 collective bargaining agreement by outsourcing delivery work to nonunion subcontractors, marking the latest effort to constrain the employer’s freedom to cut costs and reorganize operations.

The union represent about 330,000 UPS workers, including about 100,000 delivery van and truck drivers.

The campaign to target UPS (NYSE: UPS) subsidiary Roadie is part of a broader effort to contest a series of alleged contract violations by UPS, the union said in a post on X. The union claims the 2023 contract prohibits UPS from funneling tasks that are the sole domain of union workers to companies that use gig workers.

In November, the Teamsters publicly complained on social media that UPS was improperly diverting parcel deliveries to Roadie, which relies on lower-paid gig workers for final-mile delivery. Officials said Roadie uses UPS labels, tracking and equipment, proving Roadie is taking work from Teamster drivers.

“Over the past four years, UPS has been scaling Roadie’s operations nationwide. Dozens of Roadie distribution centers and cross-dock facilities have popped up. UPS wants more individual users on the Roadie app because the package giant is desperate to weaken the leverage, power, and solidarity of its existing Teamsters workforce,” the Teamsters claimed in its “Just Cause” Substack column in January.

In a March 4 column, the Teamsters said UPS is using Roadie “to help the company rid itself of current and future obligations to rank-and-file Teamsters.” The union has established a national Roadie Committee to coordinate grievances and compile evidence from rank-and-file members about UPS contract breaches, including mapping Roadie cross-dock facilities, ahead of action to force the company to comply with the national master contract.

But, according to Roadie’s website and parcel industry professionals familiar with both companies, Roadie handles same-day, urgent shipments, including groceries, that never go through the Brown parcel sortation network and oversize items that don’t fit in a box. The crowdsourced delivery platform instead picks up orders for customers, such as Walmart, Tractor Supply, FilterBuy, Spirit Halloween, paint brand Benjamin Moore  and Nothing Bundt Cakes, at local stores and warehouses for last-mile delivery to shoppers.

level2_keywords.meaning: 美國卡車司機工會，是北美最大的工會之一，代表卡車司機、倉庫工人等運輸和物流業的員工。
level2_keywords.example: The Teamsters union is known for its strong advocacy for workers' rights and fair labor practices in the logistics sector.

level2_keywords.meaning: 團體協商協議，指工會與雇主之間透過集體協商達成的勞動合約，內容涵蓋薪資、福利、工作條件等。
level2_keywords.example: The new collective bargaining agreement aims to improve wages and benefits for all union members at the company.

level2_keywords.meaning: 外包，指企業將部分業務或服務委託給外部供應商或第三方執行，以降低成本或提高效率。
level2_keywords.example: Many companies consider outsourcing their IT support to specialized firms to focus on their core business.

level2_keywords.meaning: 非工會轉包商/分包商，指未與工會簽訂協議，或其員工不屬於工會的外部承包商。
level2_keywords.example: The union accused the company of using nonunion subcontractors to circumvent the terms of their labor agreement.

level2_keywords.meaning: 零工工人/平台接案者，指透過數位平台接案，以短期、彈性合約形式提供服務的獨立工作者，例如外送員或共享乘車司機。
level2_keywords.example: The rise of the gig economy has led to a significant increase in the number of gig workers in various industries.

english_professor_news.level2_context:
各位同學，這則新聞談的是美國勞資關係中一個非常經典且持續演變的議題：工會與企業在成本控制及勞動權益上的拉鋸戰。具體來說，是美國卡車司機工會（Teamsters）與物流巨頭優比速（UPS）之間的糾紛。工會指控UPS透過其子公司Roadie，將原本應由工會成員負責的配送業務，外包給非工會的零工工人（gig workers）。

這背後反映的是企業為了降低營運成本、增加彈性，而傾向採用更靈活的勞動模式，例如利用零工經濟平台。然而，這直接挑戰了工會的核心價值——保障成員的薪資、福利和工作穩定性。工會認為，這種做法不僅違反了雙方簽訂的團體協商協議，更是在削弱工會的議價能力和影響力。這不僅對UPS和Teamsters有影響，也牽動著整個物流產業的勞動模式轉型，以及未來工會如何在數位經濟時代維護勞工權益的宏觀趨勢。我們可以看到，這是一個關於傳統勞動模式與新興零工經濟模式之間，如何尋求平衡的產業大哉問。

level3_translation.sentence: Prices displayed are informational.
level3_translation.translation: 顯示的價格僅供參考。

level3_translation.sentence: The Teamsters unanimously passed a resolution at its international convention in Las Vegas this week instructing leadership to challenge United Parcel Service for violating the 2023 collective bargaining agreement by outsourcing delivery work to nonunion subcontractors, marking the latest effort to constrain the employer’s freedom to cut costs and reorganize operations.
level3_translation.translation: 本週，美國卡車司機工會（Teamsters）在拉斯維加斯舉行的國際大會上，一致通過一項決議，指示領導層就聯合包裹服務（UPS）涉嫌違反2023年團體協商協議一事提出挑戰，因為UPS將配送業務外包給非工會的轉包商，這也標誌著工會最新一次試圖限制雇主削減成本和重組營運的自由。

level3_translation.sentence: The union represent about 330,000 UPS workers, including about 100,000 delivery van and truck drivers.
level3_translation.translation: 該工會代表約33萬名UPS員工，其中包含約10萬名配送廂型車和卡車司機。

level3_translation.sentence: The campaign to target UPS (NYSE: UPS) subsidiary Roadie is part of a broader effort to contest a series of alleged contract violations by UPS, the union said in a post on X.
level3_translation.translation: 工會在社群平台X上發文表示，這項針對UPS（紐約證券交易所代碼：UPS）子公司Roadie的行動，是更廣泛地挑戰UPS一系列涉嫌違約行為的一部分。

level3_translation.sentence: The union claims the 2023 contract prohibits UPS from funneling tasks that are the sole domain of union workers to companies that use gig workers.
level3_translation.translation: 工會聲稱，2023年的合約禁止UPS將屬於工會成員專屬職責範圍的任務，轉移給使用零工工人的公司。

level3_translation.sentence: In November, the Teamsters publicly complained on social media that UPS was improperly diverting parcel deliveries to Roadie, which relies on lower-paid gig workers for final-mile delivery.
level3_translation.translation: 去年11月，卡車司機工會曾在社群媒體上公開抱怨，指控UPS不當將包裹配送業務轉移給Roadie，而Roadie主要依賴薪資較低的零工工人進行最後一哩配送。

level3_translation.sentence: Officials said Roadie uses UPS labels, tracking and equipment, proving Roadie is taking work from Teamster drivers.
level3_translation.translation: 工會官員表示，Roadie使用UPS的標籤、追蹤系統和設備，證明Roadie正在搶走卡車司機工會成員的工作。

level3_translation.sentence: “Over the past four years, UPS has been scaling Roadie’s operations nationwide.
level3_translation.translation: 「過去四年來，UPS一直在全國範圍內擴大Roadie的營運規模。

level3_translation.sentence: Dozens of Roadie distribution centers and cross-dock facilities have popped up.
level3_translation.translation: 數十個Roadie的配銷中心和轉運站如雨後春筍般出現。

level3_translation.sentence: UPS wants more individual users on the Roadie app because the package giant is desperate to weaken the leverage, power, and solidarity of its existing Teamsters workforce,” the Teamsters claimed in its “Just Cause” Substack column in January.
level3_translation.translation: UPS希望Roadie應用程式能有更多個人用戶，因為這家包裹巨頭急於削弱其現有卡車司機工會成員的議價能力、影響力及團結，」卡車司機工會在今年1月發布的「正義之聲」（Just Cause）Substack專欄中如此聲稱。

level3_translation.sentence: In a March 4 column, the Teamsters said UPS is using Roadie “to help the company rid itself of current and future obligations to rank-and-file Teamsters.”
level3_translation.translation: 在3月4日的一篇專欄中，卡車司機工會表示，UPS正在利用Roadie「幫助公司擺脫對基層工會成員當前和未來的義務。」

level3_translation.sentence: The union has established a national Roadie Committee to coordinate grievances and compile evidence from rank-and-file members about UPS contract breaches, including mapping Roadie cross-dock facilities, ahead of action to force the company to comply with the national master contract.
level3_translation.translation: 工會已成立一個全國性的Roadie委員會，負責協調申訴並從基層成員那裡蒐集UPS違約的證據，包括繪製Roadie轉運站的地圖，為後續採取行動迫使公司遵守全國性主合約做準備。

level3_translation.sentence: But, according to Roadie’s website and parcel industry professionals familiar with both companies, Roadie handles same-day, urgent shipments, including groceries, that never go through the Brown parcel sortation network and oversize items that don’t fit in a box.
level3_translation.translation: 然而，根據Roadie的網站以及熟悉這兩家公司的包裹產業專業人士說法，Roadie處理的是當日、緊急的貨件，包括雜貨，這些貨件從未經過UPS的包裹分揀網絡，也處理不適合裝箱的超大尺寸物品。

level3_translation.sentence: The crowdsourced delivery platform instead picks up orders for customers, such as Walmart, Tractor Supply, FilterBuy, Spirit Halloween, paint brand Benjamin Moore  and Nothing Bundt Cakes, at local stores and warehouses for last-mile delivery to shoppers.
level3_translation.translation: 這個眾包配送平台反而是在當地商店和倉庫為客戶（例如沃爾瑪、Tractor Supply、FilterBuy、Spirit Halloween、油漆品牌Benjamin Moore和Nothing Bundt Cakes）取貨，然後進行最後一哩配送給消費者。

english_professor_news.title: Canada’s Wealthsimple Provides Access To Kalshi Prediction Market

level1_blind.text:
The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link. Prices displayed are informational.

Online brokerage Wealthsimple is providing Canadians access to Kalshi’s prediction market.

Privately held Wealthsimple, which is based in Toronto, says it plans to introduce a new app called “Wealthsimple Predict.”

The app will enable retail investors in Canada to access bets through Kalshi, an established U.S. prediction market platform.

Eightco Secures $125 Million Investment From Bitmine And ARK Invest, Shares Surge

Prediction markets let investors bet on the outcome of real-world events such as elections and sports contests. Critics accuse prediction markets such as Kalshi of running unlawful gambling operations.

Wealthsimple says it will offer prediction market trading to 4,000 events tied to economic, financial, and climate events. There is no mention of sports, which is Kalshi’s biggest market.

Management at Wealthsimple says they are responding to customer demand with the new prediction market app.

level2_keywords.meaning: 證券經紀商；券商。指提供證券、期貨等金融商品交易服務的公司。
level2_keywords.example: An online brokerage allows investors to trade stocks and other assets from their computers.

level2_keywords.meaning: 預測市場。一種讓參與者對未來事件結果下注的平台，其價格反映了市場對該事件發生的機率預期。
level2_keywords.example: Prediction markets are often used to gauge public sentiment on political elections or economic trends.

level2_keywords.meaning: 散戶投資人。指非專業機構的個人投資者，通常交易量較小。
level2_keywords.example: The new platform aims to attract more retail investors by simplifying the trading process.

level2_keywords.meaning: 非法賭博活動。指未經許可或違反法律規定的賭博行為。
level2_keywords.example: Regulators are investigating companies suspected of running unlawful gambling operations under the guise of investment.

level2_keywords.meaning: 客戶需求。指消費者對某產品或服務的渴望和購買意願。
level2_keywords.example: The company launched a new product line in response to strong customer demand for sustainable options.

english_professor_news.level2_context:
各位同學，這則新聞談到加拿大知名的線上券商 Wealthsimple，將讓他們的客戶能夠參與美國預測市場平台 Kalshi 的服務。預測市場是一個很有趣的概念，它讓投資人可以針對未來事件的結果下注，例如選舉、體育賽事，甚至是經濟數據或氣候事件。

為什麼這很重要呢？傳統上，投資人是在股票、債券等資產上進行交易，但預測市場則是在「事件結果」上進行交易。這在金融界引起了一些爭議。支持者認為，預測市場能有效匯集群眾智慧，提供對未來事件機率的洞察；但批評者則認為，這本質上就是一種「賭博」，尤其當它涉及金錢交易時，可能觸及各國的賭博法規，甚至被視為「非法賭博活動」。

Wealthsimple 這次的舉動，顯示他們看到了客戶對於這類新興金融產品的需求。他們特別強調會提供經濟、金融和氣候事件的預測，避開了 Kalshi 最大的市場——體育賽事，這可能是為了規避一些法律和監管上的風險，試圖將其定位為「投資」而非「賭博」。這對加拿大金融科技產業來說，是一個新的嘗試，也考驗著監管機構如何界定這類創新產品的性質。

level3_translation.sentence: The above button links to Coinbase.
level3_translation.translation: 上方的按鈕連結到 Coinbase 平台。

level3_translation.sentence: Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading.
level3_translation.translation: 雅虎財經並非證券經紀商或投資顧問，不提供證券或加密貨幣的銷售，也不協助交易。

level3_translation.sentence: Coinbase pays us for certain activity generated through this link.
level3_translation.translation: Coinbase 會針對透過此連結產生的特定活動支付費用給我們。

level3_translation.sentence: Prices displayed are informational.
level3_translation.translation: 所顯示的價格僅供參考。

level3_translation.sentence: Online brokerage Wealthsimple is providing Canadians access to Kalshi’s prediction market.
level3_translation.translation: 線上券商 Wealthsimple 正在提供加拿大人使用 Kalshi 預測市場的服務。

level3_translation.sentence: Privately held Wealthsimple, which is based in Toronto, says it plans to introduce a new app called “Wealthsimple Predict.”
level3_translation.translation: 這家總部位於多倫多的私人公司 Wealthsimple 表示，他們計畫推出一款名為「Wealthsimple Predict」的新應用程式。

level3_translation.sentence: The app will enable retail investors in Canada to access bets through Kalshi, an established U.S. prediction market platform.
level3_translation.translation: 這款應用程式將讓加拿大的散戶投資人能夠透過美國成熟的預測市場平台 Kalshi 進行下注。

level3_translation.sentence: Eightco Secures $125 Million Investment From Bitmine And ARK Invest, Shares Surge
level3_translation.translation: Eightco 獲得 Bitmine 和 ARK Invest 1.25 億美元投資，股價飆升。

level3_translation.sentence: Prediction markets let investors bet on the outcome of real-world events such as elections and sports contests.
level3_translation.translation: 預測市場讓投資人可以針對現實世界事件的結果進行下注，例如選舉和體育競賽。

level3_translation.sentence: Critics accuse prediction markets such as Kalshi of running unlawful gambling operations.
level3_translation.translation: 批評者指責像 Kalshi 這類的預測市場是在經營非法的賭博活動。

level3_translation.sentence: Wealthsimple says it will offer prediction market trading to 4,000 events tied to economic, financial, and climate events.
level3_translation.translation: Wealthsimple 表示，他們將提供與經濟、金融和氣候事件相關的 4,000 個預測市場交易。

level3_translation.sentence: There is no mention of sports, which is Kalshi’s biggest market.
level3_translation.translation: 新聞中沒有提及體育賽事，而體育賽事是 Kalshi 最大的市場。

level3_translation.sentence: Management at Wealthsimple says they are responding to customer demand with the new prediction market app.
level3_translation.translation: Wealthsimple 的管理層表示，他們推出這款新的預測市場應用程式是為了回應客戶的需求。

market_linker_insight.violence_connection:
今日台股大戶籌碼動向與國際財經新聞的暴力聯結，揭示了一場資本市場的「價值回歸」與「風險重估」的預先部署。當國際市場傳來Jim Cramer對SpaceX估值過高、恐成「迷因股」的嚴厲警告，並將其與Nvidia相提並論時，這不僅是對單一公司的評論，更是對當前AI科技股狂熱估值泡沫化風險的宏觀警示。巧合的是，今日外資大賣台灣AI伺服器供應鏈的關鍵廠商如鴻海與緯創，同時投信也減碼台積電與日月光投控，這絕非偶然。這批聰明錢似乎已提前嗅到高估值科技股的潛在風險，並在美股開盤前，透過台股市場進行了預防性的獲利了結與風險規避。

與此同時，外資卻大舉買進傳統產業龍頭中鋼與台塑，其中美商高盛更是巨量敲進中鋼，展現了明確的資金輪動訊號。這表明在科技股估值面臨質疑之際，國際資金正從高風險、高成長預期的AI概念股，轉向具備穩定現金流、低估值且受惠於全球經濟復甦預期的傳統產業。聯電、友達等非尖端科技股獲得外資與自營商青睞，也可能反映了資金對半導體產業更廣泛復甦的押注，而非僅限於AI晶片。這場資金從「未來夢想」轉向「現有價值」的暴力聯結，預示著市場對風險的重新定價，以及對基本面穩健資產的追逐，大戶們顯然已先知先覺，提前佈局。
